updates.title: Bug fixes
updates.summary: Resolved several menu, combat, and room-flow issues reported during demo testing.

updates.title: Added Discord
updates.summary: Added a direct Discord link so players can join development discussion and share feedback.

updates.title: Performance improvements
updates.summary: Reduced frame spikes in busy rooms and tightened UI transitions across the demo.

updates.title: Balance pass
updates.summary: Adjusted early combat pressure, pickup pacing, and challenge gate readability.
